raw_consumer_statement: I placed an order on XXXX on XX/XX/year> for a total of XXXX. I received the items on XXXX XXXX. Upon receiving the items I opened the car seat and stroller and found that some of the items were broken. I contact customer service on XXXX XXXX and spoke with a chat rep explaining the issue and was advised that the full amount would be refunded to the original payment method and there was no need to return the item due to the item being broken I could discard the item. I contacted family to take the huge box along with the items in the trash. I waited for several days and found the amount was not refunded. I contacted the chat again on XXXX and at that time I was advised that the previous rep told me incorrect information and the item needed to be returned even though it was broken. However I explained the items were already discarded. There was a ticket created to escalate to a manager for review. A few days later I was advised they would not honor my request and I would need to contact my credit card company. I contacted BestBuy which is the credit card I used for this purchase. I was notified today they determined the charge was not in error. I don't believe this is right. I purchased an item that I was unable to use and I was advised to discard the item. I would like this to be investigated as the chats at XXXX are monitored.
